name: Intimate First-Person with Retrospective Distance
narrative_summary: Retrospective narrator voice creates temporal distance between experiencing self and reflecting self, enabling future-regret framing and dramatic irony when predictions prove incorrect. Close third-person limited for analytical investigation sequences. Occasional unmarked POV expansion for antagonist confession establishing power dynamics through protagonist helplessness. Reader perceives information with identical blind spots; objective reality never provided directly.

name: Alternating Register Genre Modulation
narrative_summary: Long cumulative sentences with multiple subordinate clauses build atmosphere and investigation tension; short declarative fragments deliver shock impact and horror beats. Investigation sequences employ compound sentences simulating methodical thinking with logical connectors. Horror climax compresses into staccato fragments mimicking panicked breath response. Emotional scenes expand into flowing compound sentences allowing psychological time. Genre transitions marked through rhythm shift.

name: Functional Paragraphing with Emotional Pause
narrative_summary: Single-sentence paragraphs isolate dramatic beats, horror revelations, and emotional punches. Extended multi-sentence blocks carry exposition and internal reasoning. Dialogue-heavy exchanges use minimal attribution tags for pacing acceleration. White space functions as emotional pause marker and structural signal between POV shifts. Horror sequences employ sparse functional description versus dense sensory paragraphs during crisis.

name: Content Priority Character Voice Differentiation
narrative_summary: Character voice differentiated through content priority and syntax register rather than physical description. Protagonist uses measured analytical tone with self-deprecating deflection; allies employ emotional reasoning and casual expression; antagonists deliver exposition through lecturing tone establishing power hierarchy. Investigation sequences use Socratic question-answer patterns. Competitive dialogue where characters argue while revealing information simultaneously. Tag dialogue with action beats rather than pure attribution.

name: Sensory Priority with Physiological Response
narrative_summary: Sensory-first prioritization during horror: touch, temperature, and sound precede visual confirmation. Physical sensations (trembling, cold crawl, throat constriction, goosebumps) externalize psychological states. Environmental details selected for supernatural implication rather than comprehensive setting inventory. Supernatural elements described through effects rather than direct explanation. Single striking feature per character creates memorable specificity. Visual horror deferred through physiological response description first.

name: Reluctant Confessor Gated Information
narrative_summary: Worldbuilding delivered through character knowledge and behavior rather than omniscient summary. Information gated by character willingness creating dramatic access control; reluctant confessor mechanics justify extended backstory delivery. Protagonist thinks through logic aloud allowing necessary information to emerge naturally without obvious infodump. Companion surrogate asks obvious questions prompting explanation. Evidence chain revelation delays payoff across chapters; physical discovery followed by emotional/supernatural response creates two-part payoff. Embedded documents (letters, fictional works) advance backstory while creating dramatic irony.

name: Escalating Tension with Vulnerability-Horror Pivot
narrative_summary: Escalating tension maintained through perpetual mystery accumulation exceeding resolution bandwidth. Emotional vulnerability peak serves as horror introduction trigger—genre pivot occurs during character openness maximizing impact. Romance operates as emotional anchor and misdirection device; intimate scenes build expectations that identity-twist subverts. Grief-weaponized climax: emotional breakdown replaces physical confrontation as narrative peak. Comedic relief strategically placed before major revelations for tonal breathing room.

name: Multi-Level Hooking with Unanswered Questions
narrative_summary: Chapter endings employ multiple mechanisms: unanswered questions in ellipsis format, escalating threats, or physical danger cliffhangers. Revelation hooks use isolated single-sentence paragraphs for emphasis. Supernatural hooks accumulate sensory anomalies before explicit threat statement. Cryptic prophecy delivered through supernatural medium creates resolution/new-mystery duality. Environmental shifts (silence, temperature drop, light change) signal supernatural threshold crossings. Time markers explicit but brief anchor timeline during investigation sequences.

name: Investigation-Horror-Romance Genre Triangle with Pivot
narrative_summary: Rationalist protagonist using forensic deduction to separate supernatural truth from corrupted folklore, drawn into escalating investigations where evidence chains deliver earned payoffs, romantic tension operates as emotional anchor and misdirection, mysteries compound rather than fully resolve, sensory-first horror grounds supernatural threats in visceral bodily response, and genre pivots between investigation, romance, and visceral horror create tonal variety while maintaining forward momentum toward larger cosmological questions.

name: Evidence Chain Compound Revelation Structure
narrative_summary: Investigation follows folklore prompt → physical evidence discovery → witness testimony → witness coordination → confrontation → resolution with ambiguous supernatural implications. Payoff delayed across multiple chapters through information withholding between characters. Evidence chain revelation: physical discovery followed by emotional/supernatural response creates two-part payoff. Legend corruption motif: folklore preserves distorted version of true events requiring investigation to separate truth from myth.

name: Analytical Protagonist with Hubris and Reluctance
narrative_summary: Protagonist employs forensic deduction, memory analysis, and statistical anomaly detection to investigate supernatural phenomena. Intellectual defense mechanism during crisis; rationalist framework initially rejects supernatural before accumulated evidence forces acceptance. Admitted manipulation and emotional blindspots create deliberate unreliable narrator effect. Competence established before moral ambiguity introduction. Hubris balanced with visible vulnerability moments.

name: Layered Antagonist with Identity Revelation and Double Agent
narrative_summary: Antagonist identity remains unstable through multiple reveals (double-agent reversal, disguised mastermind) maintaining reader uncertainty about ally/enemy classification. Character with established reputation (timid/helpful) reveals hidden competence/agenda under pressure, maximizing twist impact through misdirection. Confession-as-weapon: character recounts entire history through dialogue under interrogation pressure. Antagonist delivers exposition through lecturing tone establishing power dynamics.

name: Ambiguous Supernatural with Evidence-Based Proof
narrative_summary: Supernatural elements described through effects rather than direct explanation. Physical evidence used to prove supernatural interference with human recollection and reality. Failed ritual creates ongoing threat rather than clean resolution—horror persists beyond ritual frame maintaining long-term stakes. Supernatural threat introduced through ordinary object defamiliarization. Body horror through biological corruption described through tactile and temperature wrongness.
